programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse and Dr Sloan are infected with a virus and face imminent death unless Steve and Amanda can find a cure. Crime drama, starring Dick and Barry Van Dyke, with Victoria Rowell, Charlie Schlatter and Michael Tucci

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda join Steve in a bid to prove an ambitious figure skater hired her former coach to murder a professional rival. Mystery, starring Dick Van Dyke

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While on a train journey, a young mother and her child almost prove to be the undoing of Richard Kimble

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry defends friend and client Gregory Pelham when a kidnapping hoax involving his son leads to murder, but further investigation reveals a case of blackmail

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A drugs ring is investigated, and a student is raped on campus, prompting the lawman to suspect a serial sex offender is on the lose

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Terror suspect Sonya Barak goes on the run from assassins sent by her own side, forcing Horatio and the team to race against time to recapture her and bring her to justice. Meanwhile, the presence of a cameraman recording the work of the lab causes Wolfe to make a mistake and compromise vital evidence. Starring David Caruso and Jonathan Togo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is forced to take a step back from work when his increasingly frail father Jackson begs him to help track down an old friend from the Second World War who does not have long left to live. Meanwhile, the rest of the team investigate the death of a marine sergeant who appears to have been caught in the crossfire during a bungled robbery, but Tony and Tim find evidence the victim may have been targeted. Crime drama, guest starring Ralph Waite (The Waltons), with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Marine Brandon Valdivia falls to his death from a rooftop bar and is initially thought to have committed suicide, but his family refuse to accept that possibility and persuade a congressman to put some pressure on the admiral. Sam and Callen are then brought in to re-evaluate the case and discover that Valdivia may have been involved in money laundering with a fellow marine.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A serious error in judgement leads Kimble to snub a sheriff, and it all but leads to his undoing

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A college dropout is accused of murdering the junk dealer who hired him, but Perry soon realises that the case hinges on a 20-year-old counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: For Sylvester's birthday, Team Scorpion heads to a Renaissance festival, but the revelry is cut short when a police evidence locker nearby is robbed

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The identity of the drug-dealer is discovered, and a new student acts strangely

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the bizarre deaths of a marine and two of his friends at a stag party. Elsewhere, Gibbs tries to persuade Vance to allow Ziva back into the NCIS. However, she must first pass a barrage of psychological evaluations. Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A woman is shot dead in an apartment while keeping watch on a man on a yacht in a marina, and the killer takes her camera and computer. A flash drive is recovered from the victim's baseball cap and surveillance footage on it includes images of Callen, who deduces that the pictures were taken in the days leading up to the attempt on his life and that the dead woman was the last person to see him before he was shot

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's new neighbour joins them on a mission to destroy a floating pile of trash in the sea, but they end up stranded on the quickly dissolving island

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A billionaire playboy and his date are shot by a bowman during a party celebrating a local artist, leaving the girl dead, the host in shock - and detectives unsure which of the pair was the target. Meanwhile, a music promoter is found murdered with posters promoting his new band glued to his body - and flyers for a rival group on a nearby wall. Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella investigate a new fantasy game sweeping New York, and discover that harmless role-playing has begun to overlap with reality in deadly fashion. Meanwhile, a woman's death is traced to an exotic cuisine event where the dishes include live centipedes, Brazilian cockroaches, fried tarantulas and other dubious delicacies

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in the water tank of a building in which six suspicious deaths have occurred over a 10-year period, making Lindsay wonder if the place is cursed. Meanwhile, Stella and Hawkes discover a man's corpse on a playground swing

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Part one of two. A virus is uploaded to Walter's computer, turning Team Scorpion's new 'smart' building project into a burning death trap - with people locked inside

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Paige and Ralph are stuck on a runaway subway train, which has been sabotaged to clear the tracks for a robbery, leaving the rest of the team trying to stop it before it derails

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby becomes personally involved in the case of a murdered naval scientist who she regards as a kindred spirit. The team's initial inquiries turn up little concrete information about the victim's life, but the forensic specialist makes a breakthrough when she decodes some of the mysterious markings covering the body. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team members are surprised when Gibbs asks DiNozzo's father to join them in their investigation of a murder committed at the US Naval Academy. However, Tony Sr's experience turns out to play a vital role in the inquiry, which finds the team members hunting for a missing nuclear weapon they suspect is about to be sold on the black market. Guest starring Robert Wagner

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ziva confronts her past when the team is ordered to protect her father, Mossad director Eli David, at a gathering of former heads of NCIS. The agents discover he is being targeted by terrorists who have hijacked a shipment of advanced weapons from the army. Drama, guest starring TJ Ramini and Michael Nouri, with Cote de Pablo and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. The safe house is attacked, leaving Vance in hospital and Eli missing, with his bodyguard Amit Hadar dead. The movements of all the Palestinians are accounted for at the time of the attack, making it unclear who was responsible, and Ziva suspects her Mossad replacement Liat is hiding something. Drama, starring Michael Nouri, Cote de Pablo, Rocky Carroll and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy officer scheduled to testify in a forthcoming murder trial goes missing after receiving a threat at the safe house where he was staying, and the deputy district attorney asks the NCIS agents to locate him. One of their few leads is a dead turkey Tony and McGee find in the man's fridge, so they take it to Ducky for an autopsy. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Part one of two. A virus is uploaded to Walter's computer, turning Team Scorpion's new 'smart' building project into a burning death trap - with people locked inside

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Paige and Ralph are stuck on a runaway subway train, which has been sabotaged to clear the tracks for a robbery, leaving the rest of the team trying to stop it before it derails

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Agent Callen poses as an arms trade contact in a bid to catch killer Michael Aaron Rivkin. Meanwhile, Tony fears Ziva may not be loyal to the team, and a psychologist uncovers the truth about the relationship between Gibbs and Agent Macy. With Chris O'Donnell, Louise Lombard and LL Cool J

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to work alongside the FBI to catch the killer of an Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent who was murdered during a poker game at the Secretary of the Navy's mansion. Elsewhere, Tony takes on Rivkin in a confrontation that ends in one of them being shot

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team flies to Israel, but receives a hostile reception from Ziva's father, who is the head of intelligence agency Mossad. As events unfold, Gibbs learns that Ziva was romantically involved with Rivkin and finds himself forced to make a tough decision. Guest starring Michael Nouri, alongside Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony travels to North Africa on the trail of missing agent Ziva, who is thought to have been tracking down a terrorist leader called Saleem Ulman. Intent on exacting revenge for her apparent death during a flight to Somalia, he is taken hostage by militants and discovers she is still alive - only to be given a potentially catastrophic ultimatum. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the bizarre deaths of a marine and two of his friends at a stag party. Elsewhere, Gibbs tries to persuade Vance to allow Ziva back into the NCIS. programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Two attempts are made on Chegwidden's life, prompting the team to investigate who might want to kill him and why - but they find the culprit closer to home than they had expected

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A corpse is discovered in a natural history museum, but the CSI detectives are unable to make an immediate identification because a swarm of flesh-eating beetles has partially devoured it. A six-year-old is later found hiding in the building, and proves to be a key witness. Meanwhile, Flack is called to a building site where a man has been poisoned with insulating foam

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Lindsay investigate the rape and murder of a hostess. Meanwhile, the life of a transplant patient hangs in the balance as Mac and the rest of the team try to find a hijacked helicopter carrying a donor liver. With Gary Sinise, Melina Kanakaredes, Anna Belknap and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man dressed in a superhero costume is found dead in an alley, and Mac, Stella and Dr Hawkes are taken aback to discover his everyday clothes in a nearby phone booth. Meanwhile, Danny and Lindsay investigate the murder of a promising NFL footballer. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Melina Kanakaredes, Carmine Giovinazzo and Eddie Cahill

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team searches for a top-secret CIA aircraft when two agents end up in Area 51 during a routine mission, while Walter plans to upload Megan's consciousness onto a hard drive

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer. Sylvester makes a bold move to protect Megan's wishes

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered and Gibbs and McGee are called in when she is discovered to be carrying ID bearing the name Sgt Patricia Moreno, a US marine known to have died several years earlier. The victim is discovered to have come to America from Afghanistan and a necklace reveals a fingerprint that leads the team to a known assassin. Guest starring Lolita Davidovich

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A man who stole a car and ran down and killed one of his pursuers before escaping is identified as Walton Flynn, an ex-marine now working for a private security firm in Iraq. Sam and Callen learn that the businessman he had been hired to protect had been murdered and that the people chasing him were hired by his employers to dish out their own form of justice. Crime drama, starring Chris O'Donnell and LL Cool J

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A jet-skier crashes on to the shore and is discovered to be dead, having been shot through the chest. At HQ, Hetty shows the team surveillance footage of the shooting and identifies the victim as Daniel Su, an engineer who defected from North Korea and was working for the US government on a highly classified research project. Sam and Callen visit the victim's apartment, where they find the body of a woman on the floor

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben is approached by a man who asks him to appeal on behalf of his wife, who has been accused of a crime. However, the attorney grows suspicious when he approaches the woman's lawyer and discovers she is on trial for the murder of her husband

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is killed in a carjacking incident, but Horatio becomes convinced the seemingly random crime is actually a premeditated murder. Digging into the victim's personal life and her husband's business affairs, he unearths several well-concealed secrets. Meanwhile, Alexx discovers Dr Monroe is drinking heavily - and declares her intention to turn him in. Holly Valance guest stars

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team try to find the gang members responsible for a shoot-out in a hospital emergency room. Their inquiries lead them to discover that an unfaithful girlfriend, rather than rival-related retaliation, may be behind the incident. David Caruso, Emily Procter and Adam Rodriguez star

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A patrolman is murdered during a routine traffic stop, and Horatio and the team discover the vehicle used during the crime was driven by a 16-year-old student. She denies being involved in the killing and immediately implicates someone else, but tests on the recovered murder weapon suggest she is lying. The girl's mother continues to defend her, until events take a dramatic turn

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team investigate two murders at the same hotel. A bellboy is killed by a guest, leading the detectives to a case of kidnapping and counterfeiting. Meanwhile, Calleigh finds a tourist's body in a lift, and discovers she and her husband attended a partner-swapping party the night before. Crime drama, starring David Caruso and Emily Procter

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team finds a corpse that appears to have been eaten by a large snake. When the serpent later shows up dead, the autopsy reveals drugs were being transported inside its body - and the trail leads to an old enemy of Horatio's who previously escaped justice owing to diplomatic immunity. Meanwhile, Wolfe is asked to investigate a theft, but stumbles on a case of identity fraud

programme.title: Monarch of the Glen
programme.desc: Archie organises a magnificent midsummer ball, hoping the event will make it clear to his peers that he has regained full control of the estate before Stella departs. However, she is less than keen to leave and plots to sabotage the entire event. With all the bank's top brass in attendance, Archie's future hangs in the balance. Drama, starring Alastair Mackenzie

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A badly beaten woman found in possession of a bag full of passports claims to be an asylum seeker whose political activist husband was murdered in Zimbabwe. However, when her son is abducted, a completely different story emerges and the race is on to rescue the boy from a violent and vengeful father. Gina discovers a bank robber she believed had died in a bank vault blast years ago is alive and well - and back in the country. John Rogan and Nicky Henson guest star

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Chrissie is desperate for time alone with her newborn son, but the presence of Sacha's family leaves her feeling overwhelmed. Jac prepares to donate a kidney to her mother by working a shift and trying to hide the fact that it is her birthday, but Donna makes sure the event does not go without mention, and Connie sets her sights on the role of chief executive while Ric and Michael publicly squabble

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: On her return to work, a horrified Bex learns from Luke about Pete's confession, prompting her to fly off in a rage and confront Claire, revealing publicly that she knew her brother was a rapist. Meanwhile, Abs tells a worried Nina immigration want to see him, and Guppy becomes a target for racial abuse

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Mickey kisses Sally - strictly in the course of his duties - as they trail bank robber Vince Murray to find out what he's up to back in England. Meanwhile, the old lag's son Darren proves to be a chip off the old block, staging a burglary with Ian Forrest's lad Kieran, but it's news to the youngsters that Ian was killed in the bank vault explosion while Vince survived the blast. Guest starring Nicky Henson and John Rogan

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Big surprises are in store for Peggy, whilst Nigel and Sanjay have a bet on the horses. Bianca's feeling rather low

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Peggy is spreading gossip about Mark. Lorraine is back in the Square. Carol signs a petition against the Cobra Club, and April has an admirer

programme.title: Soldier, Soldier
programme.desc: Dave almost drowns during a beach landing exercise. Meanwhile, Donna's sister Kelly falls for one of the locals and Major Kieran Voce has divided loyalties over his love life

programme.title: Pie in the Sky
programme.desc: Crabbe agrees to cook for a reluctant witness in a police safe house, and comes under threat from both a ruthless villain and an unscrupulous copper. Meanwhile, Henderson is alarmed by an unwelcome reminder of a past indiscretion. Comedy drama, starring Richard Griffiths

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Tristan appears to have an ulterior motive for taking an interest in Tricky Woo's diet, and Mrs Pumphrey gets James to be the judge at the vegetable show. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy and Peter Davison

programme.title: Brush Strokes
programme.desc: Jacko develops some outside interests - which only leads him into more trouble. Lionel loses his most treasured possession. Guest starring Pippa Haywood (Green Wing)

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: The staff of Gents' and Ladies' Ready-to-Wear volunteer to lead the fight against a takeover bid for Grace Brothers department store. Comedy, starring John Inman, Mollie Sugden and Trevor Bannister

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy takes Compo and Clegg on a nostalgic day out to the Keighley and Worth Valley Railway to ride on a steam train - but the trio soon interfere in matters that should not concern them. Brian Wilde, Bill Owen and Peter Sallis star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy hatches a plan to erect a flag in a prominent position - but first he needs to find one, and a pole to put it on. Brian Wilde stars

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: When her niece's son is charged with possession of an ecstasy tablet, suspicions remain that he has been framed, so Hetty goes undercover in his school as a cafeteria worker to clear his name. Patricia Routledge stars

programme.title: Life on Mars
programme.desc: Sam suspects a riot is in the offing when a football fan is killed. Knowing the problem will escalate as time goes by, the detective becomes determined to nip the violence in the bud, so he, Gene and Annie go undercover in a pub to catch the culprits. However, he realises the derby match that will be the focus of the conflict is the last one he went to with his dad when he was four years old

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Fresh DNA tests on an unidentified body found in 1996 reveal a family link to a Home Office fingerprint analyst, who has not seen her brother since she was seven, when he brought her over to the UK from their home country of Albania. The victim had been working as a police interpreter - and the motive seems clear when it turns out his last assignment was translating for a witness in a murder trial against a notorious Albanian criminal. Meanwhile, Gerry embarks on a French cookery course, but the language barrier results in a rather surprising date. Amanda Redman and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: Boyd receives a Nazi ceremonial dagger in an anonymous package in the post. The weapon prompts him to reopen the unsolved murder file of a girl whose body was found on the street in May 1945 - a case last examined by his former colleague Mel Silver shortly before her death. Feature-length crime drama, starring Trevor Eve and Sue Johnston

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Mickey kisses Sally - strictly in the course of his duties - as they trail bank robber Vince Murray to find out what he's up to back in England. Meanwhile, the old lag's son Darren proves to be a chip off the old block, staging a burglary with Ian Forrest's lad Kieran, but it's news to the youngsters that Ian was killed in the bank vault explosion while Vince survived the blast. Guest starring Nicky Henson and John Rogan

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: The sleuthing 12th-century monk investigates a murder as the Abbey becomes involved in the war between King Stephen and the Empress Maud. The trail of clues leads him to a cache of hidden treasure and the fleeing daughter of the castle's owner, Godith. Medieval mystery, starring Derek Jacobi

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: When the medieval monk investigates the murder of a wealthy cleric, the finger of suspicion immediately points to a new arrival at the abbey, but as Cadfael digs deeper, he uncovers connections to a family with tangled loyalties. Drama, starring Derek Jacobi, Terence Hardiman, Michael Culver, Ian McNeice, Christien Anholt and Julian Glover

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: While attending a conference, David receives a job offer that seems impossible to refuse _ will he leave Simon in the lurch? Karen anxiously prepares to meet her estranged mother for lunch, and Chris learns the truth about Beth's marital status. Anna treats a man whose health is suffering due to his job in a textile factory, but ends up equally concerned about his wife's welfare as she struggles to look after her husband and two lazy teenagers. Drama, starring Leslie Ash and Philip Middlemiss

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: A memorial service for Peggy brings memories of happy times flooding back to her family and friends. Vic puts on a brave face, while Lucy's poignant speech brings a tear to everyone's eye. Anna becomes increasingly worried about depressed widower Ted, and following a hunch, heads to the factory to find him perched on the roof _ ready to jump. Dick and Oscar are surprised by Cheryl's return and a heartfelt confession provides an important breakthrough in their bid to be happily united

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Obadiah Hakeswill returns to create more mischief, kidnapping a beautiful aristocrat and undermining the discipline of Wellesley's men. Sharpe is dispatched to thwart his old foe, and manages to inflict a humiliating defeat on French forces in the process - but only at terrible personal loss to himself. Sean Bean, Elizabeth Hurley and Pete Postlethwaite star

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Wayne's sexual antics with Pringle's daughter result in the lads being evicted from the Barley Mow, leaving them with no alternative but to camp out in Thornley Manor. However, its owner Ally Fraser remains unaware he is providing them with free board and lodging. Tim Healy and Gary Holton star

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: New plumber Harry joins the gang and promptly declares Oz to be the most important person he has ever encountered - a Falklands veteran who has been to Nashville and met Country star Merle Haggard. Jimmy Nail stars, with a guest appearance by Kevin Lloyd (The Bill)

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Laura and Rosemary are hired to create a restaurant garden on Italy's Ligurian coast, but it is not long before their working holiday is disrupted by a murder. Determined to solve the crime before returning home, they find themselves with no shortage of suspects - and matters are complicated further by a second death. Guest starring Suzanne Bertish (Rome) and Tristan Gemmill (Casualty), with Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: An archaeologist posing as Rosemary dies mysteriously during a dig for Anglo-Saxon artefacts in the grounds of Lord Engleton's stately home, presenting the duo with a fresh mystery to solve. The gardens are unaccountably blighted by yellowing, forcing the estate to close its gates to the public, and a second death suggests somebody will go to any lengths for a piece of British history. Guest starring Julian Wadham

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Laura and Rosemary are called in to investigate when gardens entered for a village contest are attacked by a disease. Further sinister undercurrents are exposed when reigning champion Donald Westward is found dead and recriminations start to fly as buried rivalries come to the surface. Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris star

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The chairman of the Classic Car Restoration Society is found dead alongside his beloved El Dorado with a lungful of gasoline. The investigators try to determine whether his fate was due to a petrol siphoning accident or something more deliberate. They also wonder whether it was linked to an unidentified dead body found in his garage the day before. Neill Rea and Fern Sutherland star

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest finds himself embroiled with MI5, which puts Lady Felicia in a compromising position - will she betray her friend to protect secrets from her own past? Drama, starring Mark Williams and Nancy Carroll

programme.title: WPC 56
programme.desc: Gina becomes embroiled in a feud between fair workers and a gang of Teddy boys as she searches for a runaway girl in Brinford. Back at the station, she struggles to remain professional when Jack makes a shock announcement, while Fenton clashes with the new DI when a dead body is discovered - distracting them from a wider mystery. Police drama, starring Jennie Jacques, Charlie De'Ath, Ben Turner and John Bowler

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: A war begins between rival taxi firms, confronting the team with a series of coincidences to investigate, and Taggart's family problems are compounded when his daughter is implicated in a murder investigation. Glasgow-set detective drama, with Mark McManus, James MacPherson and Blythe Duff. Directed by series regular Alan Macmillan, who also worked on The Bill and Ballykissangel. The supporting cast includes Iain Anders, Robert Robertson, Stewart Preston, Harriet Buchan, Leigh Biagi, Andy McEwan and Peter O'Brien

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: A brothel fire causes dark secrets to be revealed and the relationships between Eleanor, Joe and Major Quarrie to be finally resolved

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: A juggler seeks sanctuary at the abbey, desperate to escape an angry mob who believe he attacked and robbed a goldsmith. Sensing that events are not what they seem, Cadfael investigates - and it is not long before another body is found floating in the river. Medieval mystery, starring Derek Jacobi

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Sam investigates the background of an eastern European diplomat accused of a violent assault on a prostitute and learns he could be a murderer. The pressure is on when it emerges the suspect has full diplomatic immunity and is due to be deported within 24 hours. Phil and Grace interview a painter, whose valuable nude portrait of an ex-lover has been stolen. Leela accepts a post outside Sun Hill, unaware a colleague has pulled strings to ease her departure

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Stuart works fast to find the children of separated parents when CCTV footage shows the brother and sister talking to a known paedophile. New recruit PC Benjamin Gayle is teamed with Will to investigate an assault on a Polish building worker and finds himself in a tight spot when the victim's colleagues cut up rough about his fish-poaching activities on the common. Micah Balfour stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Stuart impresses his Sun Hill colleagues as he makes his debut on TV crime show Wanted, hoping to clear up a burglary case during which the victim, lawyer Ian Stroud, suffered a massive heart attack. The public response is overwhelming, leaving the team to pick through a mountain of false leads - including a sighting of a man once defended in court by Stroud who served eight years for a rape he did not commit

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A badly beaten woman found in possession of a bag full of passports claims to be an asylum seeker whose political activist husband was murdered in Zimbabwe. However, when her son is abducted, a completely different story emerges and the race is on to rescue the boy from a violent and vengeful father. Gina discovers a bank robber she believed had died in a bank vault blast years ago is alive and well - and back in the country. John Rogan and Nicky Henson guest star

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Andrew Davies' adaptation of Jane Austen's classic novel, starring Colin Firth, Jennifer Ehle, Alison Steadman, Benjamin Whitrow and Julia Sawalha. A wealthy eligible bachelor rents a property in Hertfordshire, causing a flurry of anticipation among the ladies of the district. However, it transpires he also brought along a friend - the haughty and aloof Fitzwilliam Darcy

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Mrs Bennet spots an opportunity to marry off another of her daughters with the arrival of clergyman Mr Collins. However, Elizabeth is unable to take his proposal seriously, being too preoccupied with a handsome newcomer who poisons her mind further against Mr Darcy. Alison Steadman, Jennifer Ehle and David Bamber star in Andrew Davies' adaptation of Jane Austen's classic novel

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Elizabeth visits Mr Collins once Charlotte has accepted his proposal of marriage and confides in Jane that she regards him as one of the stupidest men in England. Mrs Bennet sizes up George Wickham as a potential suitor for her daughter - but he has set his heart on society heiress Miss King

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Rejected by Elizabeth, Darcy decides to return to Rosling Park - and resolves to reveal the truth about Wickham's character in a letter. Colin Firth, Jennifer Ehle, Alison Steadman, Benjamin Whitrow and Julia Sawalha star

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Despite Miss Bingley's efforts to keep them apart, Darcy and Elizabeth's relationship grows more affectionate - until bad news arrives from Longbourn about Lydia and Wickham. Jane Austen adaptation, starring Jennifer Ehle, Colin Firth and Julia Sawalha

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Wickham's elopement with Lydia makes Elizabeth see him for what he really is, while Bingley proposes to Jane - an offer she readily accepts. Colin Firth and Jennifer Ehle star

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives of Nonnatus House return, with new nurse Barbara, who is anxious to prove herself - only to get off on the wrong foot after a late-night drinks party. A family of severely neglected children is discovered, so Trixie strives to restore their health and bring happiness into their lives, leaving Tom filled with admiration for the woman he loves, while Sister Evangelina finally undergoes tests for her abdominal pains. Shelagh finds she is at the surgery almost as much as she is at home, so the Turners come up with a solution which, for 1960, proves somewhat ground-breaking

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Barbara faces her most challenging case so far when she treats a first-time mother, only for the birth not to go according to plan. A new nurse arrives and soon makes an impression on Sister Evangelina, while Sister Julienne is worried about the increasing financial pressure on Nonnatus House, but doesn't bank on a mystery benefactor coming to the rescue. Jenny Agutter and Pam Ferris star, with Linda Bassett (East Is East) joining the cast

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: An English tourist is strangled in her villa by a killer using the victim's scarf. The crime scene indicates a robbery gone wrong, but DI Poole recalls an almost identical case back in London. He grows even more suspicious when the victim's husband turns out to be crooked former colleague Doug Anderson, a name he had hoped was consigned to the past. But even though he has a watertight alibi and the team move on to further leads, Poole can't shake the notion that his old adversary is somehow involved. Ben Miller stars, with guest appearances from Neil Pearson, Ralf Little and Miller's former Primeval co-stars Hannah Spearritt and James Murray

programme.title: Zen
programme.desc: Detective drama, based on the best-selling novels by Michael Dibdin. Aurelio Zen begins to feel like he is the only honest policeman in Rome, as he sees the city becoming overrun by corruption and deceit - and is plunged into the thick of a political scandal when he is sent to re-investigate a murder in a remote village. As pressure increases from all sides, he finds himself longing for Tania Moretti, the Chief of Police's beautiful assistant - but matters become more complicated when a vengeful gangster starts hounding him. Drama, starring Rufus Sewell and Caterina Murino

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: The body of a prostitute found in a river makes Ross realise an old adversary is importing girls from overseas to work in the vice trade. Unfortunately, his impetuous handling of the case puts others in danger and threatens to bring his career to an ignominious end - until he redeems himself with some quick thinking that gives the team a vital lead. Drama, starring Blythe Duff, John Michie and Colin McCredie

programme.desc: A personal film from Nia Dryhurst, which explores the nature of familial bonds and the complex relationship she has with her sister, Llinos. When Llinos was about to join the army, Nia was preparing to be a nun, and the differences between them have grown further over the years. Following an accident, it's time to see if they can heal the hurt and become friends
