programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the 2019 listeria outbreak in UK hospitals that left six dead and asks if enough is being done to protect vulnerable patients from a failing food safety system. She meets scientists to uncover just what listeria is and how the outbreak happened, goes inside a hospital kitchen to see first-hand how food is made and speaks with an anonymous government whistleblower who reveals cutbacks could mean another deadly outbreak will happen again

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect travels to Macclesfield to meet a first-time builder who hopes to transform an allotment shed into a Doctor Who-esque, multi-functional play den for less than £300. He also visits a spectacular live-in tree house in Scotland, and creates a medieval-style lock for the wood cabin, with Will's help. The Italian road trip takes in a holiday lodge made almost entirely from glass in the Dolomites

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In the second episode, George Clarke is joined by leading architects to help transform a house belonging to Nick and Sonia, an appallingly designed flat spread over three dysfunctional car parking spaces. George charges award-winning architects Abigail Ashton and Andrew Porter with creating something beautiful from this monstrosity. But working with a budget of £75,000, can they transform this foul flat into a proper home with two floors? And what will the pair's neighbours make of the drastic changes?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke meets single father Rick, whose four-storey terrace in Stratford-upon-Avon has just one room per floor and is totally impractical when his children come to stay. Can the architect come up with a clever redesign to create space and much-needed character? He also helps single mum Donna in Hastings, whose Victorian double reception room has not been touched for 50 years

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree only have a few weeks to prepare for their wedding, but the chateau is nowhere near ready to receive the 200 guests they have invited and finding reliable, affordable workers is proving difficult. Dick oversees the damming of the moat and the installation of a new, eco-friendly sewage system, while Angel turns her attention to giving the rooms a distinctive decor

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: India v England. Rishi Persad presents action from day two of the Second Test in the four-match series, held at MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at David and Ewa Woodward's Keats Cottage in Shanklin on the Isle of Wight. In the rooms, Donna Taylor from Jasmine House in Leicestershire makes a hair-raising discovery, while mother-and-daughter team Lesley and Chloe Priestly take a dislike to one of their competitors at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Jasmine House in Lutterworth, Leicestershire managed by Donna Taylor who believes in a no frills approach. But it doesn't take long for Martin and Sara to realise all the added extras in the room don't add up. During the afternoon Leslie and Chloe show their fighting spirit during a kickboxing lesson and all the B&Bers square up to their host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the luxury Halliwell House in Cheshire for the third day of the contest, where owners Martin Hulme and Sara Williams charge nearly £500 per night. Donna is astonished at the room rates, while David and Ewa are expecting nothing but perfection, but the self-service approach at breakfast confuses the guests, leaving Martin and Sara defiant in the face of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at Soar Chapel Guest House in Ebbw Vale, the family home of mum and daughter Lesley and Chloe Priestly. Expectations are high for this duo and one guest in particular is not disappointed. Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. David and Ewa Woodward want to challenge Martin's criticism over the way they run their business. Next, Donna Taylor wants to find out more about the issue that caused Martin and Sara to lose sleep. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Perry Jones hosts the first dinner party in Hertfordshire, believing that his 20 years of experience will ensure he wins. However, his main course leaves his guests confused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dentist Amit Koshal hosts the second night in Hertfordshire, going all out with an Indian-inspired menu. However, he confesses that his wife is unaware he can cook

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food snob Kelly Hatt hosts the third dinner party in Hertforshire, but her attempt to match wine to her menu backfires

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day in Hertfordshire, Heath Reid hopes his Italian-influenced dishes will be enough to secure him the £1,000 prize money

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Nisha Katona embarks on a less-travelled path to reveal Italy's hidden foodie gems, beginning with a look at Orvieto in the Umbria mountains

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets entrepreneur Paul Wilkinson and his wife Amy, who are building a giant new home on a 16-acre plot in Lincolnshire. The superstructure will be comprised of five circular buildings made up of interlocking timber cylinders, linked by raised wooden walkways that hang over a fishing lake. The complicated build proves difficult for Paul's local team, and their ambitious schedule of completing the project in a year soon looks out of reach

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man has a blackout driving a van and crashes into a telegraph pole. This is the second time it has happened in as many weeks and paramedics are keen to find out why

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Young parents Nicole and Stefian arrive in resus with their 19-month-old daughter Xah'Nae, who is unresponsive and has a high fever, and doctors fear she may have a life-threatening infection. Meanwhile, the team suspects 61-year-old Christine has suffered a second stroke in 10 years, and 52-year-old Graham, who has Down's syndrome, is brought into A&E by his sisters following an accident

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May work on a project to build mobility scooters capable of tackling the British countryside's terrain. Ferrari's four-wheel-drive FF is pitted against the revised, V8-engined Bentley Continental GT on a test track at the edge of the Arctic Circle, while James puts the Fisker Karma through its paces in Florida, and meets AC/DC frontman Brian Johnson

programme.title: Rick Stein's Spain
programme.desc: The chef embarks on a culinary tour of the country, laced with history, literature and stunning photography. Driving a clapped-out old VW camper van around the Galicia region on the Atlantic coast, Rick discovers places off the beaten track as he samples classic dishes of rural Spain, a country he believes has been underrated in cookery circles until quite recently

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May pay tribute to Saab, the Swedish car manufacturer that created several successful models since the late 1940s, but has now ceased production. Richard Hammond takes the passenger's seat in a Skoda rally car that races a rocket-propelled flying man, and actor Matt Smith gets behind the wheel of the Reasonably Priced Car. Jeremy also shreds the tyres of the noisy Maserati GranTurismo MC Stradale and the 510bhp Mercedes-Benz C63 AMG Black Series

Lovably feckless father Frank remains around and close friends including world-weary Toby and uptight ice-queen Anna are still on the scene. Thankfully, Lucy's more dependable parents Geoffrey and Wendy can be relied upon when the going gets tough. However, while juggling the ongoing needs of those around him, the pair disagree about the best way to keep the romance alive. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.desc: Cameras follow old friends Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer as they continue on their angling trip round the UK. This time, Paul and Bob fish the river Wensum in Norfolk for Roach, but as the pair struggle up and down the riverbanks, they begin to realise how age is starting to take its toll on their physicality. After staying overnight in a disused train station and visiting a local pub, the pair decide to challenge each other to a fishing competition the following day, where the winner gets a very special culinary treat

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuiness, Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff go on a road trip in a trio of affordable second-hand convertibles. On the test track, Chris puts the new Ariel Atom through its paces, while Freddie goes bungee jumping off a dam in an old Rover

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of kayakers head to the Himalayas to visit the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. Legend has it that at some point, the river drops off the face of the planet

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.title: Hypothetical
programme.desc: Josh Widdicombe and James Acaster pose ridiculous Hypothetical scenarios to Suzi Ruffell, Tom Allen, Sophie Duker and Desiree Burch

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan, Matt Lucas and Liza Tarbuck join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig for an extended edition of the unconventional quiz. This time, the focus falls on the theme 'Odds and Ends'. During the course of the show, the panellists learn how to tell a schnauzerorgan from a paddywhack. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window, as the fiendishly difficult questions lead to points being awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct

programme.title: QI XL

During the course of the show, the panellists find out how to sort the sheep from the goats, discover the opposite of Tarzan, and meet the telescope that points straight through the Earth. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window, as the fiendishly difficult questions lead to points being awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct

Items include a rare 18th-century glass bought from a charity shop for 10 pence, a pair of Queen Victoria's surprisingly large knickers and a medal awarded during an early 20th-century expedition to the Antarctic

Peter Ginn joins a footplate crew and receives coal-shovelling tips from a veteran steam engine driver of 63 years' experience, and with Alex he learns about one of Scotland's most lucrative exports. Ruth Goodman finds out about the dangers involved in working on the Victorian railways, and how those who lost limbs were catered for by a dedicated prosthetics workshop. programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard heads to Scotland to see a Victorian theatre in Aberdeen and the remote town of Rothes. Plus, sidekick Tee shows him how to do a deal at a steam railway in Devon

programme.desc: The Young Guns spend all of their savings on a hydraulic digger that causes more problems than it solves. Elsewhere, the Blacklighters are dealt a dose of reality

programme.desc: Becky braves sub-zero temperatures to fish in a remote lake, but daylight is running out fast. Pike Mike searches for a precious source of bush medicine, Kim and Pierre break camp and begin their winter trapping season and Bentley heads cross-county with a fishing boat in tow

programme.title: Robson Green's Australian Adventure

programme.title: Mega Shippers

Laura has five sizzling hot properties to show them for their £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north Surrey, planning enforcement officer Becky is joined by singing teacher Petrina, drum teacher Rob, solicitor Shoba and building company boss Giovanni. Becky plans to delight her guests with an evening of modern home-cooking and a menu including butternut, lamb and a deconstructed apple dessert. The week gets off to an intriguing start with young gun Rob taking a shine to Petrina and vice versa

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Solicitor Shoba hosts the second night in north Surrey, and tries to impress with an Indian-themed menu. However, the guests are less than impressed with the food, especially the main course - a curry made from frozen fish - but will a bit of belly dancing, Bollywood-style, help save the day? Meanwhile, singer Petrina and drummer Rob continue their flirting both at and away from the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Drum tutor Rob hosts the third night in north Surrey, hoping his Thai-themed menu will impress his guests, as well as the object of his affections, Petrina. He serves prawns with lemon, lime and chilli for his starter, Thai chicken curry for his main, and rounds off with his own take on an ice-cream sundae. As a single man living in his stepmother's house, Rob thinks his competitors will see him as an underdog, so is intent on pulling out all the stops

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Singing teacher Petrina hosts the fourth dinner party in north Surrey, and she believes her experience of entertaining on cruise ships will give her the edge as she plans a showstopper of an evening. However, the diners seem more interested in their host's continued flirting with fellow guest Rob. Will tonight be the night, or will he shy away when he discovers Petrina has sung in the West End and worked with dozens of household names?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Giovanni hosts the final night of the competition in north Surrey, intent on flying the flag for Sicily with some family inspired recipes. Even with help from his father, a tagliatelle tragedy leaves him with Parmesan on his face. Becky is less than impressed with Giovanni's dishes, and matters go from bad to worse when he attempts to serve his home-made pasta. However, poor food doesn't deter a romantic Rob from popping the question to Petrina, sending shockwaves across the dining room. In a final attempt to bag the £1,000, Giovanni invites an opera singer to liven up the proceedings, but his musical initiative may prove too little to save the day

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes a dislike to KACL's newest presenter, sharp-tongued radio psychiatrist Dr Nora. Award-winning episode of the comedy series, guest starring Christine Baranski and Piper Laurie

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Cassandra Stone, the woman Frasier dated on Valentine's Day, agrees to go out with him again - but the appearance of his former girlfriend Faye, who has been out of the country for a while, complicates matters. Comedy, guest starring Virginia Madsen and Amy Brenneman

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is on Spain's Costa Blanca house-hunting around the vibrant resort of Villamartin with Amanda and Steve, who want to buy a holiday home where they can spend the winter months golfing, socialising and soaking up the sun. Danni has been given a budget of £85,000, with which she finds five properties that she thinks fits the bill. Will Amanda and Steve love one of them sufficiently to buy it?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In southern Spain, Jonnie Irwin goes house-hunting in and around the hill-top town of Competa, Andalucia, with Michael and Seamus from Northern Ireland. The duo love cooking and entertaining and are searching for a holiday home where they can invite all their friends. However, while Seamus likes a modern style, Michael has much more traditional tastes, so with a budget of £175,000 and five options up his sleeve, Jonnie tries to come up with the perfect property to suit them both

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Matthew's 1968 MGC GT sportscar gets restorers Sunjay and Hannah hot under the collar. Inga brings in a 1920s 'beer engine' - aka pint puller - which her husband bought on a whim a few years ago. She's now looking to get it fixed up and sold on. The final item in need of restoration is an unusual rotating bookcase, owned by student Nick

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon and the team revamp a traditional southern food restaurant located in Richmond, Virginia. It is owned by Shane and her two daughters Chelsea and Kelyn, who have poured all their money into it - and are now in debt and trying to avoid bankruptcy

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The wife, mother and daughters of a man who has been hit by a car wait for news from the doctors of whether he has suffered internal injuries, including a bleed on the brain. Other patients include a man who has cut off four of his toes mowing the lawn, and a three-year-old boy who has suffered a seizure

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Two singletons in the wedding industry hope to find love for themselves on Valentine's Day, and a 71-year-old retired politician looks for someone to go travelling with. A West End actor may get over his romantic stage fright with the help of a musical theatre fan, while a delivery driver may finally have found a woman who is not driven off by his jokes

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes with UK Sotheby's International Realty, with the coronavirus pandemic having seen a surge of super-rich buyers leaving towns and cities. The brokers set out to sell a property in Highgate, north London, that is on the market for £40 million, as well the home of former Liverpool FC CEO Peter Moore on the Wirral

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Brixworth in Northamptonshire to catch up with Sarah and Ian who appeared on the show back in 2015. Back then, they had just one toddler and two dogs and their two-bed semi was bursting at the seams. Ian wanted to move on, but Sarah was determined to stay, convinced their home had the potential to cater for a growing family. Now, Phil returns to find out what happened next

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig

Filmed over 12 months, the programme interweaves the police's enquiries with an intimate portrait of a British-Chinese family coming to terms with the impact of murder, with the story of migrants from Hong Kong who came to the UK in search of a better life for their son unfolding alongside the hunt for the killers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

How will the University of Westminster graduate, who is used to having his lavish lifestyle paid for by his parents, survive on a tight budget?

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord offers a former tenant the use of a spare room until she gets back on her feet, but then struggles to evict her - and things get even more difficult when the woman moves her partner in. A landlord travelling abroad has to return to London when her tenants stop paying the rent, and Harrow Council officers find 30 mattresses in a flat designed for four people

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Mansfield mother-of-two Kerrie was left feeling betrayed after renting her house to a friend in need, who then stopped paying any rent. To add insult to injury, she also ruined the house by keeping too many dogs at the property. Mental health nurse Emmanuel found himself in a financial hole when his tenant stopped paying rent or answering his calls, and a landlord in Notting Hill ended up being owed £16,000 after five months of receiving no rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market including a landlord who decided to sell his east London flat so he could afford a property with his girlfriend. But when he told his tenant, things quickly turned sour and the man stopped paying rent and refused to leave. Plus, the story of a pub owner in Lincolnshire trying to evict his tenant, having rented it 10 years ago on a 'gentleman's handshake'. Now, however, he is owed a staggering £40,000 in unpaid rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In north London, Harrow council officers investigate an overcrowded property. An inspection uncovers many issues, including an unauthorised loft conversion that is a danger to the tenants who sleep there. A couple in Suffolk agree to rent a property to its former owner, who now refuses to leave, and a single mum tricks her way into a Milton Keynes property, confirming she has paid the deposit having done no such thing

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve discover a locked wooden case when they are called to evict tenants from a flat in London's Docklands. Opening it up, they realise they urgently need police back-up - and the property quickly becomes a crime scene. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner get caught up in a dispute between a landlord and a tenant who refuses to move out, and Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin chase a £17,000 debt. In Essex, a couple owe their neighbour £11,000, and on the south coast, debt collection from a Turkish restaurant gets complicated when there is confusion about ownership

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A Devon woman finds herself spending a night in the cells after a dispute with a neighbour who just happens to be a policeman, while a York man gets an unexpected soaking after an argument with the person next door. In Glasgow, an upset over an invitation leads to a hospital visit and a criminal record for one unhappy homeowner

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A man living in Cumbria takes issue with his neighbour's habit of letting his menagerie of chickens, cockerels, parrots and other birds freely wander along a residential road, and is even more disturbed by the fact that some of his fellow residents don't seem to have a problem with it. A former urban couple who moved to a rural valley in north Wales to breed horses enter open conflict with the owners of a nearby yurt business, whose fireworks parties spooked one of their prized beasts, resulting in an injury. Finally, a Romanian woman finds herself subject to abuse when she tries to set up a new home with her daughter in Wigan

programme.title: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: First in a two-part documentary about the disappearance of nine-year-old Shannon Matthews in Yorkshire in 2008, an investigation that gripped the nation, which turned out to be hoax kidnapping plot devised by her mother. Featuring exclusive interviews with Shannon's best friend, members of the local community, and the police officers who eventually found her, the programme reveals the remarkable truth of what really happened

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Examining the murder of retired schoolteacher Alethea Taylor. She went missing in 2012 and her body has never been found. Alethea's friends and family are among the contributors

programme.title: Murdered By
programme.desc: An investigation into the stabbing of 20-year-old Sam Caulfield in Crawley, West Sussex. Including contributions from the victim's family, revealing how this ultimate betrayal has changed their lives for ever

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1980, serial killer Peter Sutcliffe - known in the press as the Yorkshire Ripper - murdered 13 women and attacked at least seven more in the north of England. In this programme, psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Sutcliffe and look at events in his childhood and adult life that may have triggered his descent into murder, and also examine how he managed to avoid suspicion despite being interviewed by police numerous times

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary looking at how the German supermarket has succeeded in the UK, overcoming industry hostility and old-fashioned snobbery to win the public over with its discounted goods. Former staff reveal how Aldi has overcome shoppers' suspicions using a host of clever techniques to cut costs, from multiple barcodes and less time spent at the tills, to their own-brand products - which are intended to look and taste like their big-name counterparts, but cost a fraction of the price

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Reality show in which two families from opposite ends of the wealth and class divide swap homes, budgets and social status for seven days to discover how the other half lives. The Fiddes family from Royal Wootton Bassett rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a six-bedroom home paid for by husband Matt's chain of martial arts centres. For the four-strong Leamon family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their four-bedroom terrace on a Southampton council estate, and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,500 instead of their usual £170

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV means wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd, looking at its use in convicting people involved in the August 2011 riots across England

programme.desc: The parents of a baby given up for adoption could provide a clue to the death of a new mother - but the investigation also turns up long-buried family secrets. The detectives are forced to consider the possibility that racial prejudice played a part in the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Lupo and Bernard investigate when a community activist is murdered. Meanwhile, Van Buren gets bad news from former detective Ray Curtis. Police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto, Anthony Anderson and S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into a freelance journalist's murder leads detectives Lupo and Bernard to uncover a connection between the victim and a talk-show host. Crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The fatal stabbing of a psychologist draws Briscoe and Curtis into a heated divorce case and pits McCoy and Ross against a manipulative attorney who puts results before professional ethics. Award-winning American police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate when a student is shot dead after a party gets out of control. The victim's boyfriend is arrested, but the officers later receive a tip-off about someone else - a vengeful youth deliberately infecting girls with HIV. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Last-ever episode of the long-running crime drama. When Van Buren discovers a website featuring footage of an alarming amount of explosives, Lupo and Bernard race to find the anonymous blogger who filmed it before his plans to bomb a school are put into action. However, the Department of Education's refusal to take the threat seriously and resistance from the teachers' union complicate the investigation

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A worker at a meat-packing plant is killed in the workplace, prompting Logan and Briscoe to turn their attention to the man's disgruntled Russian bride. The pair learn the foreign widow married in the hope of a better life, but fell in love with a co-worker - and out of favour with her husband

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Two FBI agents try to seize control of the team's investigation into the discovery of a perfectly preserved body hidden in a chimney at a marine base. Reluctant to be ousted from the case, Gibbs agrees to work with them - and learns the victim was a serial killer responsible for the deaths of 14 people. Meanwhile, McGee's literary efforts lead to discord with the others

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team tries to find out who was responsible for sabotaging a robotic vehicle that caused the death of a Navy lieutenant and almost killed Abby. Meanwhile, Ziva's suspicions are aroused by the discovery that Tony is repeatedly visiting the hospital. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Michael Weatherly, Cote de Pablo and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead marine intelligence officer in a motel room sets the team off on a hunt for her killer. Although the town's authorities have allegedly already investigated the crime, Gibbs is determined to conduct his own thorough inquiries - which may lead him to a terrorist cell. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins and Benson investigate the rape of an underage girl, who initially refuses to co-operate or press charges against a trio of suspects, but eventually comes clean and leads the detectives to the strip club where she works - although her boss denies any wrongdoing and rejects a request for his client list. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team responds to the reported kidnapping of a 16-year-old girl at a party - and her disappearance could be linked with her boyfriend's gang associations. Elsewhere, Benson has a ceremony to decree her becoming the new SVU sergeant. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team members search for a missing diabetic child who also suffers from an attachment disorder. A shocking confession from the youngster's mother leads them to a couple of known sex offenders, and the detectives face a race against time to find the kid before he falls into a coma. Meanwhile, Benson is preoccupied by a pregnancy scare. Guest starring Rosanna Arquette

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Controversy grips New York when a black teenager is shot by a white celebrity chef, who claims she was defending herself against the city's serial rapist - an assumption that proved incorrect. Assistant District Attorney Barba faces a tough battle against a shrewd defence lawyer as he seeks justice for the victim and his family

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An officer accuses his former colleagues from the 12th Precinct of fraud and cover-ups, but it results in him being committed to a psychiatric ward. programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sarah Walsh wakes up from a night of partying believing she has been raped for a second time and calls Detective Benson, who handled her previous case. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Columbo: Identity Crisis (1975)
programme.desc: A CIA operative arranges a grisly fate for a fellow spy who found out that he was working as a double agent. The killer makes the murder look like a random mugging, but he is not as clever as he thinks and the crumpled cop soon begins to pick up on the trail of clues he has left behind. Crime drama, directed by and starring Patrick McGoohan, with Peter Falk and Leslie Nielsen

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)
programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

programme.title: Columbo: A Bird in the Hand (1992)
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with a mountain of debts comes up with a plan to make some easy money. He plants a bomb under his wealthy uncle's car in the hope of inheriting a large legacy - but a hit-and-run driver jeopardises the entire scheme and Columbo is soon sniffing around for clues. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Tyne Daly, Greg Evigan and Don S Davis

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy

programme.title: Columbo: Publish or Perish (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless publisher hires a hitman to kill a best-selling author who has threatened to sign with a rival company - but reckons without the involvement of the cigar-smoking sleuth, who is determined to put the culprit behind bars. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Mickey Spillane, Jack Cassidy and John Chandler

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life

Back at the park, staff are anxious as chimp Athena undergoes an eye operation, while squirrel monkey Fidget is a hit with the ladies

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Staff prepare for the arrival of two new woolly monkeys from Switzerland, but they are worried how the animals will cope with the long journey - and how they will fit in once they get here. programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Tom discovers he would qualify for a lump sum from his pension if he were married, so tries to strike up a deal with Sally. Meanwhile, Amber decides to impress her new boss by taking up cycling and, much to Tom's annoyance, receives tuition from Roy on how to ride a bike. Comedy, starring Clive Swift, Roger Lloyd Pack and Jane Asher

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot offers his body and Gary fixes up a burglar alarm in forlorn efforts to impress Deborah

programme.title: Ill Met By Moonlight (1957)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War thriller following the exploits of a squadron of British officers who head into Nazi-occupied Crete to kidnap a German general from under his comrades' noses, but struggle to transport their prisoner back to Cairo unnoticed. Starring Dirk Bogarde, Marius Goring and Cyril Cusack. Directed by frequent collaborators Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger

programme.title: The Only Way (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, set in occupied Denmark and telling the story of a heroic effort to smuggle 7,000 Jews over the border into Sweden so they might escape the Holocaust. Starring Ove Sprogoe and Jane Seymour

programme.title: A Handful of Dust (1989)
programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby

programme.title: The Old Guys

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Military drama following life for a group of SAS recruits, starring Ross Kemp

programme.title: Death Trench (2017)
programme.desc: At the end of the First World War, a squad of soldiers investigates an abandoned German underground base. They soon face a fight for survival against the victims of an experimental biological weapon, who have been transformed into frenzied bloodthirsty killers. Horror, starring Rossif Sutherland and Robert Stadlober

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to Mary Millington, Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970s

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Satirical comedy, starring Adrian Edmonson as Eddie Monsoon, a TV entertainer who following the failure of several pilot shows in his native South Africa faked his suicide and went to Brazil. He eventually arrives in England where he attracts notoriety with his explicit stage and media work, and later, while undergoing treatment of drug and alcohol addiction, agrees to sell an interview about his life and career

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael tries to get Joe Pesci to star in his proposed new film Bongo in the Congo, but receives an unenthusiastic response. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick decides to dedicate his life to religion, while Joe receives decorating advice from Roger Moore. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s takes a look at the origins of jazz and challenges the theories that it is a black music form which was created in New Orleans. Featuring contributions and footage from Miles Davis, Duke Ellington, Charlie Mingus and Louis Armstrong

programme.desc: Production by the London Children's Ballet. The enduring tale of the determined Fossil sisters, Pauline, Petrova and Posy, as they take to the stage in order to support their adopted family.

programme.title: Mystery on Bird Island (1954)
programme.desc: Five youngsters living in the Channel Islands discover a plot to smuggle valuable birds' eggs out of the country. Children's adventure, starring Mavis Sage and Jennifer Beach

programme.title: Deadlier than the Male (1966)
programme.desc: Private eye Bulldog Drummond grows suspicious of an industrialist who involves himself in immensely lucrative business deals. Drama, starring Richard Johnson, Elke Sommer, Sylvia Koscina, Nigel Green and Suzanna Leigh

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread (1991)
programme.desc: A wealthy widow travels to Italy to escape the pressure of her in-laws, and promptly falls in love with a poor local. When the revived woman agrees to marry her foreign friend, her relatives back home are shocked by the apparent disregard for class, culture and their family's image, and set about putting an end to the unlikely union. Period drama, based on the novel by EM Forster, starring Helena Bonham Carter, Judy Davis and Rupert Graves

programme.title: Girl in the Headlines (1963)
programme.desc: An inspector investigating the murder of a fashion model is led straight into the lair of an international drug-smuggling ring. Crime drama, starring Ian Hendry, Ronald Fraser, Jeremy Brett, Margaret Johnston and Natasha Perry

programme.title: Strictly Confidential (1959)
programme.desc: Two conmen fresh out of prison are given prestigious jobs by a widow - not realising she has a devious scheme in mind. Comedy, starring Richard Murdoch, William Kendall, William Hartnell and Maya Koumani

programme.title: Jungle Street (1960)
programme.desc: Two men commit a robbery, but when one of them takes the rap for it, the other muscles in on his girlfriend. Crime drama, starring Jill Ireland, David McCallum and Kenneth Cope

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: An injured Ash is rushed to hospital, his confidence shattered - but an emergency forces him to return to duty. Final episode of the Second World war drama

programme.title: Our Queen
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary filmed throughout 2012, providing an in-depth portrait of Elizabeth II during her Diamond Jubilee year. Prince Charles and other members of the royal family share their stories, providing insights into the Queen's life over an important and busy 12 months filled with celebrations. The programme also reveals what really happens when the prime minister sits down with the monarch, and the lid is lifted on that memorable 007 moment at the London Olympic Games opening ceremony

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Satirical comedy, starring Adrian Edmonson as Eddie Monsoon, a TV entertainer who following the failure of several pilot shows in his native South Africa faked his suicide and went to Brazil. programme.title: Lost in London (2017)
programme.desc: In a recreation of a true story, the first film beamed live to cinemas as it was shot, actor Woody Harrelson embarks on a wild night out in London. He bumps into friends like Owen Wilson and Daniel Radcliffe before ending the night in prison. Comedy filmed in one-take by director and star Harrelson, with Eleanor Matsuura

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: Helga, She Wolf of Stilberg (1978)
programme.desc: A sadistic female Nazi officer runs a women's prison during the Second World War, and forces the inmates to be her sexual playthings. However, the latest arrival, a determined resistance fighter, proves to be far more difficult to dominate. Prison drama, starring Malisa Longo and Patrizia Gori. In French

programme.title: Time Without Pity (1957)
programme.desc: An alcoholic writer returns home after years living abroad when he learns his estranged son has been convicted of murder and sentenced to hang. Although his attempts at reconciliation are rejected, he spends the last 24 hours before the execution trying to prove his son is innocent by identifying the real killer. Mystery, starring Michael Redgrave, Ann Todd, Leo McKern and Peter Cushing

programme.title: Chinese New Year: Year of the Ox
programme.desc: Bringing together highlights from the capital's past Chinese New Year Celebrations and new and exciting cultural performances to see in the year of the Ox

programme.title: Blind Corner (1964)
programme.desc: A composer's wife learns her husband plans to cut her out of his will, so conspires with her lover to murder him first. Crime drama, starring William Sylvester and Barbara Shelley

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Capital Conversation

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Thirty delegations from around the world arrive to stay at the hotel for the duration of the Olympics, with the red carpet being rolled out five times a day for heads of state. World-famous Danish eatery Noma sets up a pop-up restaurant in the ballroom and Claridge's chefs are faced with providing Nordic-foraged food to thousands of guests who have paid £195 each. A couple fly in from Atlanta for the wedding of their dreams and a butler prepares a suite for one of the hotel's most valued guests, bringing furniture, hat boxes and 20 suits out of storage for just one night

programme.title: Hitler: The Last Ten Days
programme.desc: Dramatisation based on eye witness accounts of Hitler's final days in an underground bunker, his military henchmen, and his stormy relationship with Eva Braun

programme.title: Erskineville Kings (1999)
programme.desc: A man who fled his home town to escape his abusive father decides to return once he receives word that the old man is dead. However, he faces a bitter reunion with the brother, who stayed behind to care for their father in his last days, and his ex-girlfriend, whom he abandoned with no explanation. Drama, starring Marty Denniss, Hugh Jackman and Joel Edgerton

programme.desc: A humourless priest in a Catholic boys' school falls victim to a practical joke played by his favourite student - with tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Richard Burton, Dominic Guard, Billy Connolly, Sharon Duce and Andrew Keir

programme.title: Sporting Heroes
programme.desc: An interview with the former boxer, who reigned supreme in the featherweight division in the latter half of the 1990s, but came unstuck when he faced Marco Antonio Barrera. Hamed first won the WBO title in 1995 when he dethroned Steve Robinson, and also went on to claim the IBF and WBC belts before suffering the sole loss of his career to Barrera in Las Vegas in 2001, and retired after one final bout against Manuel Calvo in 2002

programme.desc: AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am. Coverage of the second day from Pebble Beach Links in California, a tournament which was won by Canadian Nick Taylor. American's have dominated this tournament this century, winning 19 of the 21 editions since 2000.
